# FlowKits

> Battle-tested AI workflows in Python. Not n8n JSON you can't debug.

FlowKits is a marketplace for production-ready AI automation workflows. Each kit is a complete Python project with error handling, retry logic, AI reasoning, and monitoring hooks. Built from n8n's most popular templates, rebuilt in clean Python.

## What it does

- Provides downloadable AI workflow kits as Python projects
- Each kit includes: workflow.py, README.md, AGENTS.md, configuration
- Workflows cover: email automation, sales prep, marketing campaigns, productivity
- **AI agent operated**: your AI agent (Claude, Cursor, Copilot) reads AGENTS.md and runs, monitors, fixes, and extends the workflow autonomously
- Free tier: open-source code, AI agent runs it
- Paid tier: execution monitoring, failure alerts, AI-powered auto-healing

## Available workflows

- Gmail AI Email Labeler — AI categorizes and labels your inbox (Free)
- AI Landing Page Analyzer — CRO audit for any URL (Free)
- Pre-Meeting AI Briefing — Company news + talking points before meetings ($15)
- Google Sheets Email Campaign — AI-personalized outbound from a spreadsheet ($19)
- Human-in-the-Loop Email Responder — AI drafts, you approve before sending ($19)

## AI Agent Integration

Every kit includes an AGENTS.md file for AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot) to understand and extend the workflow.

## Pages

- / — Landing page with workflow showcase and email capture
- /api/subscribe — Email waitlist signup
- /api/auth — GitHub OAuth authentication
